site.name: AI Dance
site.tagline: Turn photos into realistic dance videos with AI motion transfer. Upload a portrait, pick a dance style, and generate viral content for TikTok and Reels in minutes.

pages.title: Styles
pages.text:
# AI Dance Generator - Make Any Photo Dance Online

Turn photos into realistic dance videos with AI motion transfer. Upload a portrait, pick a dance style, and generate viral content for TikTok and Reels in minutes.

## Site basics
- Site ID: aidance
- Website: https://aidance.live
- Default locale: en
- Locales: en, de, fr, ja, ko

## Public feature scope
- image gen
- video gen
- pricing

## Official website
https://aidance.live
